zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelicia Nevers於1174年出生在法國洛易-吉黑福利迪瓦爾時，她的父親Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay29歲，母親Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault29歲。她和Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelicia Nevers于1174年出生在法国洛易-吉黑福利迪瓦爾时，她的父亲Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay29岁，母亲Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault29岁。她和Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Nevers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from the city of Nevers in France.
Possibly an altered form of English Nevard or perhaps of its extinct variant Neverd. The surname Nevers is also found in Jamaica.

History: The majority of the American bearers of this surname trace their origin to Richard Nevers, born in 1666 in Woburn, MA. His origin is not known, but his surname is also documented in the forms Nevard and Neverds, which make it possible that Richard Nevers was of English origin.

variants.name: Nevard
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Nevard, from ancient Germanic Niwhard, from niw- ‘new’ + hard- ‘strong, hardy’. Compare Nevers .

nameMeanings.name: Adelicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the Late Latin name Delicius, a derivative of deliciae ‘delight’. Use as a given name seems to be a modern phenomenon; it is not found in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Delysia
meanings: Feminine form of the Late Latin name Delicius, a derivative of deliciae ‘delight’. Use as a given name seems to be a modern phenomenon; it is not found in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelicia Nevers was born in 1174, in Fréteval, Loir-et-Cher, France, her father, Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay, was 29 and her mother, Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault, was 29. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelicia Nevers est née en 1174, à Fréteval, Loir-et-Cher, France, son père, Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelicia Nevers 1174 in Fréteval, Loir-et-Cher, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay 29 und ihre Mutter Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault 29. Sie hatte mit Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelicia Nevers è nata il nel 1174 nel Fréteval, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, sua padre, Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelicia Neversが1174年にフランスロイル-エト-チャーフルeテヴァルで生まれた時，父Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslayは29歳，母Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtelleraultは29歳であった。彼女はGeoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudunとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelicia Nevers(이)가 1174년 프랑스 로이-트-처 프e테발에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelicia Nevers nasceu em 1174, em Fréteval, Loir-et-Cher, França, seu pai, Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelicia Nevers родилась в 1174 г. в местности фрeтеваль, лоир-ет-чир, Франция, её отцу по имени Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelicia Nevers nació en 1174, en Fréteval, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, su papá, Lord Ursion II de Fréteval de Meslay, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lady Grecia De Faye de Châtellerault, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Geoffroy de Châteaudun V Vicomte de Châteaudun.
